{{ 'RESERVATION.TITLE_DETAIL' | translate }} (Staff)

{{ 'INVENTORY.LOADING' | translate }}
} @if (error) {
{{ error | translate }}
} @if (!loading && !error && reservation) {
@if (reservation.reservationStatus === 'CREATED') { {{ 'RESERVATION_STATUS.CREATED' | translate }} } @if (reservation.reservationStatus === 'PICKED_UP') { {{ 'RESERVATION_STATUS.PICKED_UP' | translate }} } @if (reservation.reservationStatus === 'RETURNED') { {{ 'RESERVATION_STATUS.RETURNED' | translate }} } @if (reservation.reservationStatus === 'CANCELLED') { {{ 'RESERVATION_STATUS.CANCELLED' | translate }} }

{{ 'RESERVATION.SELECTED_EQUIPMENT' | translate }}

@if (!reservation.items || reservation.items.length === 0) {
{{ 'RESERVATION.NO_EQUIPMENT_SELECTED' | translate }}
} @else { @for (item of reservation.items; track item.id) { }
{{ 'INVENTORY.EQUIPMENT_MODEL' | translate }} {{ 'INVENTORY.EQUIPMENT_TYP' | translate }} {{ 'INVENTORY.EQUIPMENT_SKILL' | translate }} {{ 'INVENTORY.EQUIPMENT_PRICE' | translate }}
{{ item.model }} {{ 'EQUIPMENT_TYPE.' + item.equipmentType | translate }} {{ 'SKILL_LEVEL.' + item.targetSkillLevel | translate }} {{ item.price | currency:'EUR':'symbol':'1.2-2' }}
{{ 'RESERVATION.TOTAL_PRICE' | translate }}: {{ reservation.totalPrice | currency:'EUR':'symbol':'1.2-2':'de-AT' }}
}
} @if (showDeleteModal) {
{{ 'RESERVATION.DELETE_TITLE' | translate }}

{{ deleteError }}
}
}
